summary: Add smoke tests for 16 zero-coverage packages, fix broken atomicWriteJson import in feature-flags
details: Created test/smoke.test.js for 16 packages that had zero test coverage. Each smoke test verifies module importability and main export presence (2 tests per package, 32 total). Fixed pre-existing broken import of non-existent atomicWriteJson from @opencode/crash-guard/safe-json in opencode-feature-flags, replaced with fs.writeFileSync. Packages: backup-manager, dashboard-launcher, errors, eval-harness, fallback-doctor, feature-flags, goraphdb-bridge, graphdb-bridge, logger, model-sync, plugin-healthd, plugin-lifecycle, plugin-preload-skills, proofcheck, runbooks, shared-orchestration.
impact: Medium - establishes baseline test coverage for 16 previously untested packages
